scripts.start: node apps/web/scripts/mkcert-dev.mjs && concurrently -n server,next,tls "npm -w @jarvis/server run dev" "cd apps/web && npx next dev -p 3001 -H localhost" "cd apps/web && node dev-proxy.mjs"
scripts.start:ci: concurrently -k -s first -n server,next "npm -w @jarvis/server run dev" "cd apps/web && npx next dev -p 3000 -H 127.0.0.1"
scripts.web: node apps/web/scripts/mkcert-dev.mjs && concurrently -n next,tls "cd apps/web && npx next dev -p 3001 -H localhost" "cd apps/web && node dev-proxy.mjs"
scripts.ci:smoke: concurrently -k -s first "npm run start:ci" "wait-on -t 60000 http://127.0.0.1:3000 https-get://127.0.0.1:1234/config && npm run smoke:ci"
